title: [BRP] Better ressource Packs
description: Adds the ability to download resource packs from Minecraft directly
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32a419518ff28ab3ef29aac3e5e2081b38195456.png)
Better Ressource Packs adds a built-in **ressource pack** browser directly to Minecraft’s Resource Packs screen, so you can find and install packs without leaving the game. [**1.21.11 & 26.1**] (1.21.6-1.21.10 are dprecated & may have issues)

## Requirements:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
